contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Fix Sophia voice replies: stale-adapter deploy bug + Telegram channel context
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/106
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/107
  
  Details:
  Debugged why Sophia did not reply in voice to Telegram voice notes. Found two issues: (1) the Telegram adapter was running stale code because the self-deploy tool restarted only the main service, never the adapter or watchdog — so the voice-reply feature merged but never went live; restarted the adapter to load it and fixed deploy.py to restart all three units going forward. (2) Voice transcripts reached the LLM with no channel info, so it assumed the DApp web chat and replied in text saying it could not do voice — added a system note for voice messages telling the model it is on the Telegram bot, its reply is synthesized to voice, and URLs are sent separately. Confirmed edge-tts works on the box. Also verified Sophia had correctly drafted the implementation plan and execution roadmap before coding, and closed a stale duplicate PR.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
